scenarios.title: LLM Finetuning And Local Serving
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks mention Unsloth, Unsloth Core, Unsloth Studio, fast LoRA or QLoRA finetuning, local Studio/API serving, GGUF conversion, or the unsloth CLI.
scenarios.role: Provides repo-specific routing and self-contained workflows for Unsloth Core APIs, CLI commands, Studio runtime, and checkpoint export.
scenarios.read_when: User says unsloth, FastLanguageModel, FastVisionModel, get_peft_model, unsloth train, unsloth studio, unsloth run, unsloth connect, GGUF export, Ollama Modelfile, Studio API, Cloudflare secure tunnel, RAG, or llama.cpp runtime.
scenarios.best_for: Planning and troubleshooting Unsloth finetuning scripts, CLI dry-runs, Studio launch/connect/runtime behavior, and safe checkpoint export or GGUF conversion preflights.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is generic Hugging Face Transformers, generic TRL/PEFT use without Unsloth, unrelated model evaluation, or running long training/export jobs without explicit approval.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `unsloth` over generic ML skills when the task depends on Unsloth-specific loader signatures, CLI commands, Studio server behavior, export helpers, or repository-tested edge cases. Start at the root route, then use the focused sub-skill matching the user's interface.
